channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Thursday, May 14, 2026
item.description: Three threads converge today that touch almost every part of your work, Midya. The SpaceX and OpenAI IPO pipeline — potentially $5 trillion hitting public markets — signals that the AI investment era is entering a new, more volatile phase, which matters for how you position AI-in...
